site.title: One File Tools
site.description: A collection of useful developer tools, each built as a single, self-contained HTML file. No build step. No dependencies. No frameworks.

categories.name: Web & SEO
categories.description: Meta tags, OG previews, sitemaps, and SEO utilities

categories.name: Image Tools
categories.description: Dimensions, converters, SVG, favicons, and metadata

categories.name: Color Tools
categories.description: Pickers, contrast checkers, palettes, and converters

categories.name: CSS Tools
categories.description: Shadows, grids, flexbox, gradients, and generators

categories.name: Text & Content
categories.description: Counters, converters, diffs, and Markdown preview

categories.name: JSON & API
categories.description: Formatters, JWT decoders, URL encoders, and curl builders

categories.name: Developer Utilities
categories.description: UUIDs, hashes, regex, cron, passwords, and QR codes

categories.name: Browser & Network
categories.description: User agents, viewport info, cookies, and headers

categories.name: Accessibility
categories.description: Contrast checkers, heading structure, ARIA references

tools.name: Open Graph Generator
tools.shortDescription: Generate Open Graph meta tags and preview how your links appear on social media.
tools.longDescription:
## Open Graph Generator

Create perfectly formatted Open Graph meta tags for your website. Preview how your links will appear when shared on Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn, and other social platforms.

### Features

- Live preview of social cards
- Generate `og:title`, `og:description`, `og:image`, and more
- Copy-paste ready meta tag output
- Twitter Card support
- LinkedIn preview

tools.name: Open Graph Checker
tools.shortDescription: Validate and preview existing Open Graph tags from any URL.
tools.longDescription:
## Open Graph Checker

Paste any URL and instantly see its Open Graph metadata. Validates required tags, shows warnings for missing properties, and previews how the link appears on social platforms.

### Features

- Fetch and parse OG tags from any URL
- Validation against OG protocol spec
- Visual preview cards
- Warning for missing recommended tags

tools.name: Meta Tag Generator
tools.shortDescription: Create standard HTML meta tags for SEO, social sharing, and browser behavior.
tools.longDescription:
## Meta Tag Generator

A comprehensive meta tag builder that generates all the essential HTML meta tags your page needs. Covers SEO, social sharing, viewport, charset, and more.

### Features

- SEO meta tags (title, description, keywords, robots)
- Social meta tags (OG, Twitter Card)
- Technical meta tags (charset, viewport, theme-color)
- Copy all tags with one click

tools.name: Twitter / X Card Preview
tools.shortDescription: Preview how your links will appear when shared on Twitter / X.
tools.longDescription:
## Twitter / X Card Preview

See exactly how your links will look when shared on Twitter / X. Supports Summary, Summary Large Image, App, and Player card types.

### Features

- All Twitter Card types supported
- Live preview as you type
- Validation of required fields
- Generate twitter:card meta tags

tools.name: Robots.txt Generator
tools.shortDescription: Build a robots.txt file visually with user-agent rules and sitemaps.
tools.longDescription:
## Robots.txt Generator

Create robots.txt files without memorizing the syntax. Add user-agent rules, allow/disallow paths, and sitemap references through a visual interface.

### Features

- Add multiple user-agent blocks
- Allow and disallow paths
- Sitemap URL support
- Crawl-delay setting
- Download or copy the generated file

tools.name: JSON Formatter
tools.shortDescription: Format, validate, and minify JSON with syntax highlighting and error detection.
tools.longDescription:
## JSON Formatter

Paste messy JSON and get it beautifully formatted instantly. Validates JSON structure, highlights syntax errors with line numbers, and can minify for production use.

### Features

- Format / prettify JSON with configurable indentation
- Minify JSON (remove whitespace)
- Syntax highlighting
- Error detection with line and column numbers
- Copy formatted output
- Download as .json file

tools.name: JWT Decoder
tools.shortDescription: Decode and inspect JSON Web Token header, payload, and signature.
tools.longDescription:
## JWT Decoder

Paste a JWT and instantly see its decoded header, payload, and signature. Highlights expiration, issued-at, and other standard claims.

### Features

- Decode header and payload
- Highlight standard claims (exp, iat, sub, iss)
- Expiration check (expired / valid / no expiry)
- Color-coded token parts
- Copy decoded sections

tools.name: URL Encoder / Decoder
tools.shortDescription: Encode and decode URL strings, query parameters, and URI components.
tools.longDescription:
## URL Encoder / Decoder

Quickly encode or decode URLs and URI components. Handles special characters, query strings, and full URLs.

### Features

- Encode / decode full URLs
- Encode / decode URI components
- Handle special characters
- Batch mode for multiple values
- Copy result to clipboard

tools.name: Base64 Encoder / Decoder
tools.shortDescription: Encode and decode Base64 strings for text, data URIs, and binary data.
tools.longDescription:
## Base64 Encoder / Decoder

Convert text to Base64 and back. Supports UTF-8 text, binary data, and data URI generation for images.

### Features

- Text to Base64 encoding
- Base64 to text decoding
- File to Base64 conversion
- Data URI generation
- UTF-8 support

tools.name: Color Picker
tools.shortDescription: Pick colors and get output in HEX, RGB, HSL, and OKLCH formats.
tools.longDescription:
## Color Picker

A visual color picker that outputs colors in every format you need. Pick from the color wheel or enter values directly.

### Features

- Visual color wheel / area picker
- HEX, RGB, HSL, OKLCH output
- Copy any format to clipboard
- Color history (recent picks)
- Named CSS colors reference

tools.name: Contrast Checker
tools.shortDescription: Check WCAG 2.1 AA and AAA contrast ratio compliance between two colors.
tools.longDescription:
## Contrast Checker

Verify that your text and background color combinations meet WCAG 2.1 accessibility standards. Shows pass/fail for both AA and AAA levels.

### Features

- WCAG 2.1 contrast ratio calculation
- AA and AAA pass/fail indicators
- Large text and normal text checks
- Visual preview of the color combination
- Suggest closest accessible color

tools.name: Gradient Builder
tools.shortDescription: Create CSS linear and radial gradients visually with live preview.
tools.longDescription:
## Gradient Builder

Design beautiful CSS gradients with a visual editor. Supports linear and radial gradients with multiple color stops.

### Features

- Linear and radial gradient support
- Multiple color stops with drag positioning
- Angle / direction control
- Live CSS output
- Copy CSS to clipboard
- Preset gradients library

tools.name: Box Shadow Generator
tools.shortDescription: Design CSS box shadows with live preview, multiple layers, and code export.
tools.longDescription:
## Box Shadow Generator

Create beautiful CSS box shadows with a visual editor. Add multiple shadow layers, adjust offsets, blur, spread, and color.

### Features

- Multiple shadow layers
- Horizontal and vertical offset sliders
- Blur radius and spread control
- Color picker with opacity
- Inset shadow toggle
- Live preview and CSS output

tools.name: CSS Grid Generator
tools.shortDescription: Build CSS Grid layouts visually with interactive rows, columns, and areas.
tools.longDescription:
## CSS Grid Generator

Design CSS Grid layouts by clicking and dragging. Define rows, columns, gaps, and named areas, then export clean CSS.

### Features

- Visual grid builder
- Add/remove rows and columns
- Drag to create grid areas
- Gap and alignment controls
- Responsive preview
- Export HTML and CSS

tools.name: Flexbox Playground
tools.shortDescription: Experiment with Flexbox properties and see the effects in real time.
tools.longDescription:
## Flexbox Playground

Learn and experiment with every CSS Flexbox property. Toggle container and item properties and see instant visual feedback.

### Features

- All flex container properties
- All flex item properties
- Add/remove flex items
- Visual highlighting of alignment
- Export CSS

tools.name: Image Dimension Checker
tools.shortDescription: Drop or upload an image to instantly see its width, height, and aspect ratio.
tools.longDescription:
## Image Dimension Checker

Drag and drop any image to instantly view its dimensions, aspect ratio, file size, and format. Works entirely in the browser.

### Features

- Drag and drop or file upload
- Width, height, and aspect ratio display
- File size and format detection
- Multiple image support
- No images are uploaded anywhere

tools.name: SVG Previewer
tools.shortDescription: Paste SVG code and preview it instantly with zoom and background options.
tools.longDescription:
## SVG Previewer

Paste SVG markup and see it rendered immediately. Toggle backgrounds, zoom in/out, and inspect SVG dimensions.

### Features

- Live SVG rendering from code
- Dark/light/checkerboard background toggle
- Zoom controls
- SVG dimension display
- Download as PNG option

tools.name: Lorem Ipsum Generator
tools.shortDescription: Generate placeholder text in paragraphs, sentences, or words.
tools.longDescription:
## Lorem Ipsum Generator

Generate placeholder text for your designs and layouts. Choose the number of paragraphs, sentences, or words.

### Features

- Generate by paragraphs, sentences, or words
- Configurable count
- Start with "Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet..."
- Copy to clipboard
- Plain text and HTML output

tools.name: Word / Character Counter
tools.shortDescription: Count words, characters, sentences, and paragraphs with reading time.
tools.longDescription:
## Word / Character Counter

Paste or type text and get instant statistics. Word count, character count (with/without spaces), sentence count, paragraph count, and estimated reading time.

### Features

- Word count
- Character count (with and without spaces)
- Sentence and paragraph count
- Estimated reading time
- Live update as you type

tools.name: Case Converter
tools.shortDescription: Transform text between camelCase, snake_case, UPPER, lower, Title, and more.
tools.longDescription:
## Case Converter

Convert text between every common casing style. Useful for developers switching between naming conventions.

### Features

- camelCase
- PascalCase
- snake_case
- kebab-case
- UPPER CASE
- lower case
- Title Case
- Sentence case
- CONSTANT_CASE
- dot.case

tools.name: Regex Tester
tools.shortDescription: Test regular expressions with live matching, group highlighting, and flags.
tools.longDescription:
## Regex Tester

Write and test regular expressions with instant visual feedback. See matches highlighted in your test string, with capture groups color-coded.

### Features

- Live regex matching
- Capture group highlighting
- All regex flags (g, i, m, s, u, y)
- Match count and details
- Common regex patterns library
- Replace mode

tools.name: UUID Generator
tools.shortDescription: Generate random v4 UUIDs instantly with bulk generation support.
tools.longDescription:
## UUID Generator

Generate RFC 4122 compliant v4 UUIDs. Create single or bulk UUIDs with one click.

### Features

- Generate single UUID
- Bulk generation (up to 100)
- Uppercase / lowercase toggle
- With or without hyphens
- Copy to clipboard
- History of generated UUIDs

tools.name: Timestamp Converter
tools.shortDescription: Convert Unix timestamps to human-readable dates and vice versa.
tools.longDescription:
## Timestamp Converter

Convert between Unix timestamps (seconds and milliseconds) and human-readable date formats. Shows local time, UTC, and ISO 8601.

### Features

- Unix timestamp to date
- Date to Unix timestamp
- Seconds and milliseconds support
- Local time and UTC display
- ISO 8601 output
- Current timestamp display

tools.name: Hash Generator
tools.shortDescription: Generate MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, and SHA-512 hashes from text input.
tools.longDescription:
## Hash Generator

Generate cryptographic hashes from text input using the Web Crypto API. Supports multiple hash algorithms.

### Features

- MD5 (via JS implementation)
- SHA-1
- SHA-256
- SHA-512
- Live hashing as you type
- Copy any hash to clipboard
- File hashing support

tools.name: Password Generator
tools.shortDescription: Generate strong random passwords with customizable length and characters.
tools.longDescription:
## Password Generator

Generate cryptographically strong random passwords. Customize length, character sets, and exclusions.

### Features

- Configurable length
- Include/exclude: uppercase, lowercase, numbers, symbols
- Exclude ambiguous characters (0, O, l, 1)
- Password strength indicator
- Generate multiple passwords
- Copy to clipboard

tools.name: QR Code Generator
tools.shortDescription: Create QR codes from text, URLs, or data with download options.
tools.longDescription:
## QR Code Generator

Generate QR codes from any text or URL. Customize size and download as PNG or SVG.

### Features

- Text and URL input
- Configurable size
- Error correction levels
- Download as PNG
- Download as SVG
- Color customization

tools.name: Markdown Previewer
tools.shortDescription: Write Markdown on the left, see rendered HTML on the right in real time.
tools.longDescription:
## Markdown Previewer

A split-pane Markdown editor with live preview. Write Markdown on the left and see it rendered as HTML instantly on the right.

### Features

- Live preview as you type
- GitHub Flavored Markdown support
- Syntax highlighting for code blocks
- Full-screen editing mode
- Export as HTML
- Print-friendly output

tools.name: Slug Generator
tools.shortDescription: Convert text to URL-friendly slugs with customizable separators.
tools.longDescription:
## Slug Generator

Convert any text into a clean, URL-friendly slug. Handles special characters, accents, and Unicode.

### Features

- Automatic slug generation
- Customizable separator (hyphen, underscore)
- Unicode and accent handling
- Maximum length setting
- Live preview
- Copy to clipboard

tools.name: Cron Expression Builder
tools.shortDescription: Build and understand cron schedule expressions with a visual interface.
tools.longDescription:
## Cron Expression Builder

Build cron expressions visually instead of memorizing the syntax. See a human-readable description of when your cron job will run.

### Features

- Visual cron builder (minute, hour, day, month, weekday)
- Human-readable schedule description
- Next 5 execution times
- Preset common schedules
- Copy expression to clipboard

tools.name: User Agent Parser
tools.shortDescription: Parse and explain browser user agent strings into readable components.
tools.longDescription:
## User Agent Parser

Paste any user agent string and see it broken down into browser, engine, OS, and device information. Also shows your current user agent.

### Features

- Parse any user agent string
- Detect browser name and version
- Detect OS and platform
- Device type detection
- Show current browser's user agent
- Common user agents reference

tools.name: Viewport / Screen Info
tools.shortDescription: Display current device viewport, screen dimensions, and pixel ratio.
tools.longDescription:
## Viewport / Screen Info

Instantly see your current viewport width, screen resolution, device pixel ratio, and more. Updates live as you resize.

### Features

- Viewport width and height (live)
- Screen width and height
- Device pixel ratio
- Color depth
- Orientation
- Touch support detection
- CSS media query matches

tools.name: Heading Structure Visualizer
tools.shortDescription: Paste HTML or a URL to visualize the heading hierarchy and spot issues.
tools.longDescription:
## Heading Structure Visualizer

Visualize the heading structure (h1-h6) of any HTML page. Highlights skipped levels and accessibility issues.

### Features

- Paste HTML to analyze
- Tree view of heading hierarchy
- Highlight skipped heading levels
- Accessibility warnings
- Outline view matching screen reader behavior
